name: quandora-staging
description: Staging Quandora plugin with Factor Mining and Strategy skills for pre-release workflow testing.

interface.shortDescription: Use staging Quandora services from your agent.
interface.longDescription: Quandora Staging packages Factor Mining and Strategy skills in one plugin. Factor Mining supports staging tasks, sessions, factor source submission, backtests, artifact retrieval, and result summaries; Strategy composes and resumes cross-sectional runs from existing factors.
defaultPrompt: Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining to show public tasks.
Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining with my custom factor idea.
Use Quandora Staging Factor Mining to resume a run and summarize results.
Use Quandora Staging Strategy to combine existing factors into a cross-sectional strategy.
